publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to delete and restore all users, on your behalf.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to delete and restore all users, on behalf of the signed-in user.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Delete and restore users

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Enable and disable user accounts
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to enable and disable users' accounts, on your behalf.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to enable and disable users' accounts, on behalf of the signed-in user.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Enable and disable user accounts

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Export user's data
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to export data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), associated with any user in your company, when the app is used by a privileged user (e.g. a Company Administrator).
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to export data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), associated with any user in your company, when the app is used by a privileged user (e.g. a Company Administrator).
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Export user's data

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Invite guest users to the organization
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to invite guest users to the organization, on your behalf.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to invite guest users to the organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Invite guest users to the organization

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Manage  user identities
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to read, update and delete identities that are associated with a user's account that you have access to. This controls the identities users can sign-in with.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to read, update and delete identities that are associated with a user's account that the signed-in user has access to. This controls the identities users can sign-in with.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Manage  user identities

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Sign in and read user profile
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows you to sign in to the app with your organizational account and let the app read your profile. It also allows the app to read basic company information.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows users to sign-in to the app, and allows the app to read the profile of signed-in users. It also allows the app to read basic company information of signed-in users.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Sign you in and read your profile

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Read all users' full profiles
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to read the full set of profile properties, reports, and managers of other users in your organization, on your behalf.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to read the full set of profile properties, reports, and managers of other users in your organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Read all users' full profiles

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Read all users' basic profiles
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to read a basic set of profile properties of other users in your organization on your behalf. Includes display name, first and last name, email address and photo.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to read a basic set of profile properties of other users in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes display name, first and last name, email address and photo.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Read all users' basic profiles

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Read and write access to user profile
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to read your profile, and discover your group membership, reports and manager. It also allows the app to update your profile information on your behalf.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to read your profile. It also allows the app to update your profile information on your behalf.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Read and update your profile

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Read and write all users' full profiles
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to read and write the full set of profile properties, reports, and managers of other users in your organization, on your behalf.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to read and write the full set of profile properties, reports, and managers of other users in your organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Read and write all users' full profiles

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Revoke all sign in sessions for a user
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allow the app to revoke all sign in sessions for a user on your behalf.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allow the app to revoke all sign in sessions for a user, on behalf of a signed-in user.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Revokes all sign in sessions for a user

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Read and write app activity to users' activity feed
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to read and report your activity in the app.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to read and report the signed-in user's activity in the app.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Read and write app activity to your activity feed

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Read user authentication methods.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to read your authentication methods, including phone numbers and Authenticator app settings. This does not allow the app to see secret information like your passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use your authentication methods.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's authentication methods, including phone numbers and Authenticator app settings. This does not allow the app to see secret information like the signed-in user's passwords, or to sign-in  or otherwise use the signed-in user's authentication methods.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Read your authentication methods.

publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Read all users' authentication methods
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to read authentication methods of all users you have access to in your organization. Authentication methods include things like a user’s phone numbers and Authenticator app settings. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.
publishedPermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to read authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. Authentication methods include things like a user’s phone numbers and Authenticator app settings. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.
publishedPermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Read all users' authentication methods
